auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ERPNext API key used with token authentication. Generate it from the user record's API Access section as described in the Frappe REST API docs: https://docs.frappe.io/framework/user/en/api/rest

extraFields.label: Base URL
extraFields.description: Base URL of your ERPNext or Frappe instance.

extraFields.label: API Secret
extraFields.description: ERPNext API secret paired with the API key for token authentication. Frappe shows it in the Generate Keys popup in the user record's API Access section: https://docs.frappe.io/framework/user/en/api/rest

actions.name: create_document
actions.description: Create one ERPNext document for the specified DocType.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

data.description: The document fields to create or update in ERPNext.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating an ERPNext document.

document.description: An ERPNext document or nested payload.

actions.name: delete_document
actions.description: Delete one ERPNext document by DocType and name.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

name.description: The unique name of the ERPNext document.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one ERPNext document.

ok.description: Whether ERPNext confirmed the document deletion.

outputSchema.description: The deletion status returned by ERPNext.

actions.name: get_document
actions.description: Get one ERPNext document by DocType and name.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

name.description: The unique name of the ERPNext document.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching one ERPNext document.

document.description: An ERPNext document or nested payload.

outputSchema.description: The ERPNext document returned by the request.

actions.name: get_document_count
actions.description: Get the count of ERPNext documents that match an optional filter.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

anyOf.description: A field-to-value filter object accepted by ERPNext.

items.description: A positional filter tuple accepted by ERPNext.

anyOf.description: An array of positional filter tuples accepted by ERPNext.

filters.description: Filters passed through to ERPNext as JSON.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for counting ERPNext documents.

actions.name: get_document_value
actions.description: Get one ERPNext field value or a group of field values without loading the full document.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

name.description: The unique name of the ERPNext document.

anyOf.description: A field-to-value filter object accepted by ERPNext.

items.description: A positional filter tuple accepted by ERPNext.

anyOf.description: An array of positional filter tuples accepted by ERPNext.

filters.description: Filters passed through to ERPNext as JSON.

anyOf.description: One field name to request from ERPNext.

items.description: A field name to request from ERPNext.

anyOf.description: Field names to request from ERPNext.

fieldname.description: One field name or an array of field names to request from ERPNext.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one or more ERPNext field values. Provide exactly one of name or filters.

value.description: The field value or object returned by ERPNext.

outputSchema.description: The ERPNext field value or value object returned by the request.

actions.name: get_logged_user
actions.description: Get the currently authenticated ERPNext user for the configured connection.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching the current ERPNext user.

outputSchema.description: The authenticated ERPNext user returned by the server.

actions.name: list_documents
actions.description: List ERPNext documents for a DocType with optional field selection, filters, sorting, and pagination.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

items.description: A document field to include in the list response.

fields.description: The ERPNext document fields to include in the response.

anyOf.description: A field-to-value filter object accepted by ERPNext.

items.description: A positional filter tuple accepted by ERPNext.

anyOf.description: An array of positional filter tuples accepted by ERPNext.

filters.description: Filters passed through to ERPNext as JSON.

order_by.description: The ERPNext order_by expression such as modified desc.

page_length.description: The maximum number of ERPNext documents to return.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ERPNext documents.

items.description: An ERPNext document or nested payload.

documents.description: The ERPNext documents returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: The ERPNext documents returned by the list query.

actions.name: set_document_value
actions.description: Set one field value on an ERPNext document and return the updated document.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

name.description: The unique name of the ERPNext document.

fieldname.description: The ERPNext field name to update.

value.description: The field value or object returned by ERPNext.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating one ERPNext field value.

document.description: An ERPNext document or nested payload.

outputSchema.description: The ERPNext document returned after the update.

actions.name: update_document
actions.description: Update selected fields on one ERPNext document.

doctype.description: The ERPNext DocType name to operate on.

name.description: The unique name of the ERPNext document.

fields.description: The document fields to create or update in ERPNext.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating an ERPNext document.

document.description: An ERPNext document or nested payload.
